Speaker: LPC
Text: Could you make room for me here this, uh... this morning?

Speaker: LPC
Text: I haven't got any room for about 10 to 15 minutes.

Speaker: Man
Text: I haven't got any rooms.

Speaker: Man
Text: I can't make room for you in a room I haven't got.

Speaker: LPC
Text: Could you make room for just about 10 to 15 minutes?

Speaker: Man
Text: No, I'm not going to put you in somebody's room for ten or fifteen minutes.

Speaker: LPC
Text: They'll be asleep.

Speaker: LPC
Text: They'll be none the wiser.

Speaker: Man
Text: No.

Speaker: Man
Text: You'll have to try someplace else.

Speaker: LPC
Text: Can I just like crash out in your room for a few minutes?

Speaker: Man
Text: No.

Speaker: LPC
Text: For, like, ten minutes?

Speaker: Man
Text: No.

Speaker: LPC
Text: Just, you know... it'll he... it'll be rejuvenating somewhat, you know?

Speaker: Man
Text: No, you'll have to try some place else.

Speaker: LPC
Text: Hmm... but you're... in my neighborhood?

Speaker: Man
Text: I don't know, I'll tell you.

Speaker: LPC
Text: Could you work on my feet for a little while?

Speaker: Man
Text: Well, why don't you go fuck yourself, man?

Speaker: Man
Text: Fuckin' idiot!

Speaker: LPC
Text: What are you trying to say? [laughing]
